mapper.select:
SELECT RB.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, RB.TITLE AS title, PU.USER_NAME AS writer, RB.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, RB.VIEW_COUNT AS views FROM REVIEW_BOARD RB JOIN PLOGUES_USER PU ON RB.USER_ID = PU.USER_ID WHERE RB.DELETED = 'N' ORDER BY RB.BOARD_NO DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS
FETCH NEXT #{boardLimit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT RB.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, RB.TITLE AS title, PU.USER_NAME AS writer, RB.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, RB.VIEW_COUNT AS views FROM REVIEW_BOARD RB JOIN PLOGUES_USER PU ON RB.USER_ID = PU.USER_ID WHERE RB.DELETED = 'N' AND RB.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY RB.BOARD_NO DESC
OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS
FETCH NEXT #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REVIEW_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REVIEW_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N' AND USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT RB.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, RB.TITLE AS title, PU.USER_NAME AS writer, RB.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, RB.CONTENT AS content, FROM REVIEW_BOARD RB JOIN PLOGUES_USER PU ON RB.USER_ID = PU.USER_ID WHERE RB.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND RB.DELETED = 'N'
